data.body:
[1/20(Tue) Temporary Maintenace Notice]

To improve game stability and performance, a temporary maintenance will be conducted during the schedule below.
Please ensure that you safely save your data and exit the game before maintenance begins.

- Schedule: 1/20(Tue) 6:00 AM ~ 7:00 AM (UTC)
- Impact: The game will be unavailable during the maintenance period.
- Compensation: Pyroxene x120

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=3353070

#BlueArchive
![G869J9KagAAKvpV.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/16025/uVkamp3VzhfNHEmLP2j1UWuZDn8IlOK6.jpg)
